name: Markus Freiberg
bio: Markus co-founded two B2B SaaS companies in Munich, most recently exiting his HR-tech platform to a DAX-listed firm in 2023. He now invests in early-stage European startups and mentors founders through the GLC community. His operational background gives him a rare ability to spot both product gaps and go-to-market risks.
tagline: B2B SaaS builder turned hands-on investor.
looking_for: Looking to co-invest with other angels in pre-seed B2B SaaS rounds across the DACH region.
can_help_with: Can help with fundraising strategy, pitch deck review, and introductions to early-stage VCs in Germany.

name: Sophia Hartmann
bio: Sophia is the founder of Luminary Studios, a Munich-based brand and design agency serving purpose-driven startups. She has shaped the visual identities of over 30 companies and is passionate about storytelling that reflects genuine values. She brings a strategic lens to creative work, helping founders articulate their 'why' before their 'what'.
looking_for: Looking for early-stage founders who need a brand identity partner from day one, not an afterthought.
can_help_with: Can help with brand strategy, logo and identity systems, pitch deck design, and website visual direction.

name: Jonas Becker
bio: Jonas is the CEO and co-founder of Clara Finance, a Munich fintech building embedded lending infrastructure for B2B marketplaces. Previously he spent six years at a Tier-1 investment bank before transitioning to the startup world. He is a licensed financial advisor and a regular speaker at Christian business events across Bavaria.
tagline: Reimagining credit for the marketplace era.
looking_for: Looking for a senior growth hire and introductions to B2B marketplace platforms interested in embedded finance.
can_help_with: Can help with fintech regulatory navigation in Germany, fundraising storytelling, and building B2B partnerships.

name: Leah Osei
bio: Leah is a principal at Northstar Capital, a Munich-based early-stage VC firm focused on impact and deep-tech. She previously founded a climate-tech startup and brings deep empathy for the founder journey to her investment work. She is active in the GLC community and believes faith-led founders build more resilient companies.
tagline: Investing in founders who build for generations.
looking_for: Looking for pre-seed and seed stage founders in climate, health, or AI building in Europe.
can_help_with: Can help with VC pitch preparation, investor narrative, and introductions to impact-focused co-investors.

name: David Kirchner
bio: David is a machine learning engineer and technical co-founder who has shipped AI products at both enterprise and startup scale. He recently left his role at a leading German AI lab to build an AI-powered document intelligence product for the legal sector. He mentors other technical founders navigating the gap between research and real-world deployment.
looking_for: Looking for a go-to-market co-founder with experience selling into law firms or enterprise legal departments.
can_help_with: Can help with AI architecture, technical hiring, and evaluating the feasibility of AI-driven product ideas.

name: Anna-Lena Vogel
bio: Anna-Lena is a growth marketing consultant who has helped B2B SaaS companies scale from zero to their first €1M ARR across DACH. She specialises in content-led SEO, demand generation, and community-driven growth loops. After a decade in corporate marketing, she now works exclusively with founder-led companies that align with her values.
looking_for: Looking for 1-2 early-stage B2B SaaS founders to partner with on fractional CMO engagements.
can_help_with: Can help with go-to-market strategy, content and SEO roadmaps, and building repeatable B2B demand generation systems.

name: Tobias Schreiber
bio: Tobias is a senior advisor and former CFO who has guided more than 15 German Mittelstand companies through digital transformation and international expansion. He now advises growth-stage startups on financial strategy, board governance, and scaling operations. He is a deacon at GLC Munich and passionate about integrating faith with business leadership.
tagline: Steady hands for the growth stage.
looking_for: Looking to join an advisory board for a growth-stage company where I can contribute meaningfully for 2-3 years.
can_help_with: Can help with CFO-level financial strategy, fundraising preparation, and building the operational infrastructure for scale.

name: Clara Weidmann
bio: Clara is a full-stack engineer and co-founder of Stackmesh, a Munich developer-tools startup building automated infrastructure provisioning for European SMEs. She studied computer science at TU München and has a strong open-source track record with contributions to several widely-used DevOps projects. She is deeply committed to building an equitable tech ecosystem.
tagline: Dev tools for the builders who keep Europe running.
looking_for: Looking for early adopter SMEs and channel partners in the DACH region to pilot our infrastructure product.
can_help_with: Can help with technical architecture decisions, open-source community building, and evaluating developer tool products.

name: Michael Adeyemi
bio: Michael is a serial entrepreneur, angel investor, and co-organiser of the GLC Business Forum Platform. He founded three companies across e-commerce, edtech, and logistics before pivoting to investing in the next generation of African and European founders. His investment thesis centres on digital infrastructure enabling underserved communities.
looking_for: Looking for co-investors and founders building digital infrastructure or marketplaces for underserved markets.
can_help_with: Can help with early-stage business model design, fundraising from diaspora and faith-aligned investors, and sales strategy.

name: Nadine Hofmann
bio: Nadine is a brand strategist and content lead who spent eight years leading communications at a Munich-based consumer startup before going independent. She now helps B2B founders translate complex products into compelling narratives for investors, customers, and recruits. She volunteers as a worship leader at GLC Munich and believes in the power of story to change culture.
tagline: Every great company is a story waiting to be told.
looking_for: Looking for a long-term retainer relationship with a B2B SaaS startup that needs to own its category narrative.
can_help_with: Can help with messaging strategy, investor narrative, content calendar planning, and social media positioning for founders.

name: Philipp Steiner
bio: Philipp is the founder of RenewTech, an energy-management SaaS platform helping manufacturing SMEs in Germany reduce their carbon footprint and energy costs. He holds a master's degree in environmental engineering and has previously worked at the intersection of policy and cleantech. He speaks on sustainable entrepreneurship at churches and universities across Bavaria.
looking_for: Looking for enterprise sales advisors with existing relationships in the German manufacturing sector.
can_help_with: Can help with navigating climate-tech grant funding in Germany and building a B2B pilot program from scratch.

name: Rebecca Nguyen
bio: Rebecca is an independent advisor specialising in product strategy and growth for early-stage SaaS companies. She spent seven years as a product manager at a Munich-based enterprise software scale-up before advising startups full-time. She combines rigorous product thinking with a deep appreciation for community as a growth channel, shaped by her involvement in GLC Munich.
tagline: Products that users love and investors can model.
looking_for: Looking for a seed-stage SaaS company to join as an embedded product advisor for 6-12 months.
can_help_with: Can help with product roadmap prioritisation, user research design, and defining the metrics that matter for Series A readiness.
